title: Subagents
description: Subagents are a powerful feature of Cursor that allow you to create and manage multiple AI agents within a single context. This sheet provides an overview of how to use subagents effectively, including best practices and common use cases.

title: Hooks
description: Hooks are a powerful feature of Cursor that allow you to extend and customize its behavior. This sheet provides an overview of how to use hooks effectively, including best practices and common use cases.

title: Prompt Injection
description: Prompt injections are a technique for influencing the behavior of AI models by embedding specific instructions within the input. This sheet provides an overview of how to use prompt injections effectively, including best practices and common use cases.
